data.body: ENDGAME PREP. Close precheck (transition_close.py:115,280) checks rebar-ticket commit REACHABLE FROM HEAD with fetch=False (local HEAD snapshot, not merged) -> Model A works: close leaves with local commits pre-merge, then land stack. S4 description NARROWED to landed scope (6 ACs [x] transport-seam; 2 [SPLIT->4af8] importer-routing+leak-reloc); re-review running (bgqojqwkd) to earn fresh attestation for close plan-review gate. PLAN: (1) await all 5 green [S1/S2/S3 green; 903/905 re-running w/ env-doc fix]; (2) close S1-S5 leaves bottom-up (each: completion-verifier + close plan-review gate; sign-review if attestation stale); (3) close epic bbf1; (4) land stack via Submit top change 905 (submits ancestors 900-903). Follow-up 4af8 stays open (deferred differ DI routing).
